creator: holm@freibergnet.de
text:
1 or 2 years? Doesn't sound nice. In my ears this sounds like "use Linux or Windows if you couldn't be happy with wine or an VM using Windowsor  if you want to just get your work done".

What are all the other things you do if not getting applications to work and who needs that?

Sorry for the sarcasm.. but it feels that every half year there is another thing that just doesn't work anymore on FreeBSD but compiling and installing LLVM in different versions seems to be the new killer application for FreeBSD.

Regards,
Holm
